reason: This is a traditional Islamic hadith sharing a positive attribute of Prophet Muhammad, commonly shared by mainstream Muslims. It contains no extremist content or ISIS-related messaging.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: عن جابر بن عبد الله رضي الله عنه قالما سئل رسول الله -صلى الله عليه وسلم- شيئًا قط فقاللا. #نشر_سيرته #ﷺ
